ecarx.carext.audio

Interface IAudioAttributes


  • public interface IAudioAttributes
    This class provides the API for accessing audio attributes functionality
    Since:
    11

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  IAudioAttributes.ContentType
      definition for get Audio Content type getAudioAttributesContentType(String)
      IAudioAttributes.ContentType.CONTENT_TYPE_MD_NAVI_HINT
      static interface  IAudioAttributes.Usage
      definition for get Audio Usage getAudioAttributesUsage(String)
      IAudioAttributes.Usage.USAGE_MD_NAVIGATION_HINT

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getAudioAttributesContentType(java.lang.String contentType)
      get audio focus request System Content Type by Content Type Metadata IAudioAttributes.ContentType
      通过IAudioAttributes.ContentType获取音频焦点请求 Content Type 类型
      int getAudioAttributesUsage(java.lang.String usage)
      get audio focus request System Usage by Usage Metadata IAudioAttributes.Usage
      通过IAudioAttributes.Usage获取音频焦点请求 Usage 类型
      int getAudioAttributesUsage(java.lang.String usage, android.view.Display display)
      get audio focus request System Usage by Usage Metadata IAudioAttributes.Usage & Display
      通过IAudioAttributes.Usage获取音频焦点请求 Usage 类型

    • Method Detail

      • getAudioAttributesUsage

        int getAudioAttributesUsage(java.lang.String usage)
        get audio focus request System Usage by Usage Metadata IAudioAttributes.Usage
        通过IAudioAttributes.Usage获取音频焦点请求 Usage 类型
        Parameters:
        usage - Usage Metadata, such as IAudioAttributes.Usage.USAGE_MD_NAVIGATION_HINT
        Returns:
        System Usage for audio focus request AudioAttributes.Builder.setUsage(int)
        Since:
        11
        See Also:
        AudioManager.requestAudioFocus(AudioFocusRequest), AudioFocusRequest.Builder.setAudioAttributes(AudioAttributes), AudioAttributes.Builder.setUsage(int)

      • getAudioAttributesUsage

        int getAudioAttributesUsage(java.lang.String usage,
                            android.view.Display display)
        get audio focus request System Usage by Usage Metadata IAudioAttributes.Usage & Display
        通过IAudioAttributes.Usage获取音频焦点请求 Usage 类型
        Parameters:
        usage - Usage Metadata, such as IAudioAttributes.Usage.USAGE_MD_NAVIGATION_HINT
        display - Which Display hold & use the Audio Usage, can be get with android.content.Context#getDisplay() , null same with getAudioAttributesUsage(String)
        Returns:
        System Usage for audio focus request AudioAttributes.Builder.setUsage(int)
        Since:
        11
        See Also:
        AudioManager.requestAudioFocus(AudioFocusRequest), AudioFocusRequest.Builder.setAudioAttributes(AudioAttributes), AudioAttributes.Builder.setUsage(int)

      • getAudioAttributesContentType

        int getAudioAttributesContentType(java.lang.String contentType)
        get audio focus request System Content Type by Content Type Metadata IAudioAttributes.ContentType
        通过IAudioAttributes.ContentType获取音频焦点请求 Content Type 类型
        Parameters:
        contentType - Content Type Metadata, such as IAudioAttributes.ContentType.CONTENT_TYPE_MD_NAVI_HINT
        Returns:
        System Content Type for audio focus request AudioAttributes.Builder.setContentType(int)
        Since:
        11
        See Also:
        AudioManager.requestAudioFocus(AudioFocusRequest), AudioFocusRequest.Builder.setAudioAttributes(AudioAttributes), AudioAttributes.Builder.setUsage(int), AudioAttributes.Builder.setContentType(int), getAudioAttributesUsage(String)
